title: Mork Borg - A Look at my Collection (as of August 2025)
body:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Cpa04rQyl18

Daniel (@dungeondive) gives a full tour of his **Mörk Borg** collection—one of his all-time favourite RPGs, where collecting and reading are pleasures entirely separate from playing.

The tour covers the essentials (Solitary Defilement, Feretory, Heretic), the curious (Fiskborg—yes, fishing in a dying world), bestiaries from Steve Jackson Games to indie creators, naval supplements with ship tokens, and full conversions spanning pirates, samurai, castaways, and cyberpunk. The Box of Terrors alone holds enough material for several videos.

If you're thinking about diving into Mörk Borg or hunting for supplements you might've missed, this catalogue is worth your time.

----

*What Mörk Borg treasures are in your collection? Obscure zines and hidden gems wanted.*
